questions.subject: Geography
questions.prompt: With reference to the major ports in India, which of the following pairs is correctly matched?

options.text: V. O. Chidambaranar Port : Tamil Nadu

questions.explanation: A is incorrect: Vadhavan Port is under construction in Maharashtra (Palghar District). B is incorrect: Kamarajar Port (Ennore) is in Tamil Nadu. C is correct: V. O. Chidambaranar Port (Tuticorin) is located in Tamil Nadu. D is incorrect: Mormugao Port is in Goa, not Karnataka.
questions.takeaway: Knowing the state-wise distribution of major ports is essential, especially for new developments like Vadhavan.
questions.evidenceExcerpt: Vadhavan, Palghar District, Maharashtra... Tuticorin (V. O. Chidambaranar Port Trust) (Tamil Nadu)... Mormugao (Goa)... Ennore (Kamarajar Port) (Tamil Nadu).

questions.subject: Economy
questions.prompt: With reference to the scale and impact of the maritime sector on India's economy, which of the following statements is correct?

options.text: Maritime trade accounts for a higher percentage of India's trading by value than by volume.
The Sagarmala Programme has led to a decrease in coastal shipping volume over the last decade to prioritize rail connectivity.
Approximately 95% of India's trading by volume is conducted through maritime trade.
The number of non-major ports in India is currently less than 100.

questions.explanation: Option C is correct: 95% of India's trading by volume is done through maritime trade. Option A is incorrect: Volume (95%) is higher than value (70%). Option B is incorrect: Sagarmala achieved 118% growth in coastal shipping. Option D is incorrect: India has approximately 200 non-major ports.
questions.takeaway: Maritime trade is the backbone of India's trade volume, accounting for nearly the entire volume of external trade.
questions.evidenceExcerpt: 95% of India's trading by volume and 70% by value is done through maritime trade... Sagarmala Programme has achieved 118% growth in coastal shipping... approximately 200 non-major ports.
